Our Mission

"We serve food that nourishes the body and calms the mind — food that feels alive."

ìkórè ilẹ̀ is a living expression of diaspora culture — a table where West African and Mediterranean culinary traditions meet the land beneath our feet. Every dish traces a lineage: from the cassava farms of Liberia to the spice souks of Marrakech, from the mezze tables of Beirut to the red stew pots of Lagos. Our menu rotates every two weeks, following the seasons and the stories that grow inside them.
